title: deparia zeylanica
intro: Deparia zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon spleenwort or Zeylanica spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Deparia zeylanica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant, which may help to prevent cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Deparia zeylanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder for consumption, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
